project.name: EntityKart
project.description: A cloud-native, microservices-based e-commerce platform built with Java 17, Spring Boot 3, Spring Cloud, Apache Kafka, and Docker. Features a responsive AngularJS SPA frontend with flash sales, price filters, coupon codes, image gallery, cancel orders, invoice download, mobile-responsive hamburger menu, and native Android + Flutter WebView clients with settings screen and bottom nav bar.

microservices.name: common-services
microservices.description: Merged monolith: Spring Cloud Gateway (JWT routing) + Netflix Eureka Server + shared common library + Kafka notification listener + async email via Gmail SMTP + admin export (Excel/Word)

feignClientMap.purpose: Validate product price/stock before adding to cart
Get product info during order creation
Fetch customer details for order enrichment
Fetch order details for payment processing
Validate order exists for return request

frontendClients.name: Web Frontend
frontendClients.description: Responsive glassmorphic dark-mode SPA with Bootstrap 5, Font Awesome icons

frontendClients.name: Native Android App
frontendClients.description: Hybrid WebView wrapper with native Kotlin bridge for API URL injection

frontendClients.name: Flutter WebView Client
frontendClients.description: Cross-platform WebView wrapper with dynamic IP/Port settings screen, bottom navigation bar (Shop + Settings), back-button handling, pull-to-refresh, and orange brand theme.

adminFeatures: Dashboard Overview (stat cards, recent products & orders list)
User Accounts CRUD (edit profile details, toggle active/inactive status, soft-delete)
Product CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete with Available/Unavailable status)
Order status management (PLACED → SHIPPED → DELIVERED) and details inspector
Payments History tracking (transaction references, amount, mode, status)
Reviews Moderation (view all product reviews, delete review)
Review statistics dashboard (avg rating, distribution chart)
Report exports (Excel .xlsx & Word .doc) for Orders, Products, Users, Payments, Returns, Reviews, Wishlist
Email report dispatch to administrator mailboxes
Cloudinary product image upload with preview
Dev History & Plans tracker with interactive checklist
securityFeatures: JWT token-based authentication validated at API Gateway
Android WebView hardened (no file access, HTTPS enforced except local dev)
Network Security Config restricts cleartext to dev IPs only
CORS configured at API Gateway level
